S.FORM: Ryan Bowen 11 a bulad 20 a demiad, 1975 a mihcaan, Ryan Bowen, miunduay.
S.PHON: *jan bowən ** a bur~ɾad ** a dəmiad, **** a miħʦaan, *jan bowən, miunduaj.
